summary: Modified densityIntermediateMCS to use density_frame_condition_reflexive_source when source is reflexive, added strictness lemmas

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary documenting all changes and new API

completion_data.completion_summary: Modified DenseTimeline.lean so densityIntermediateMCS uses strict density variant when source is reflexive, guaranteeing intermediate is not equivalent to target. Added densityIntermediateMCS_strict_from_target and densityIntermediatePoint_strict_from_target lemmas.
